heroSub: A historic finca among ancient pine forests — for weddings, celebrations, and unhurried stays.
aboutBody: Finca Matriz sits within a landscape of ancient pines and dry-stone walls, far from the noise. Built in the 18th century, the estate has been restored and continues to honour its Valencian heritage while welcoming guests and gatherings of all kinds — intimate or grand, quiet or celebratory.
aboutBody2: The property spans over two hectares of Mediterranean forest, a terrace overlooking the gardens, and a private pine forest — all framed by the warm stone of the original farmhouse.
stayBody: The residential wing — seven en-suite rooms, shared kitchen, courtyard and pool — sleeps up to 14 guests comfortably.
stayBody2: 7 en-suite bedrooms · 1 king or 2 twin beds · private bathrooms · 1 fully equipped kitchen · pool 10m × 4m · tennis court · private parking · free WiFi
eventsSub: From intimate gatherings to full-property weddings, Finca Matriz offers a singular backdrop for moments that matter.
